headline: 5 Relatively Secure And Cheap Dividend Stocks, Yields Up To 8% (April 2026)
summary: This article is part of our monthly series where we highlight 5 large-cap, relatively safe, dividend-paying companies offering significant discounts to their historical norms. Read it here.
